title: Premier Decorations Red LED Flickabrights Wax Candle Battery Operated Christmas Decoration Xmas Festive Décor 18cm x 9cm
features: ✨ Warm and Cozy Glow: These delightful wax candles create a warm and inviting atmosphere with their soft, warm white LED lights. Perfect for adding a touch of holiday charm to any room, centerpiece, or mantel.

🕯️ Realistic Flickering Effect: The 'Flickabrights' candles mimic the appearance of real flames with their lifelike flickering effect. Enjoy the comforting glow of candlelight without the mess and hazards of traditional candles.

⏲️ Timer Function: Each candle includes a convenient timer function that operates on a 6-hour on/18-hour off cycle. Once set, you can enjoy the warm ambiance without needing to manually turn the candles on and off every day.

🎁 Versatile Decor: These candles are ideal for holiday decorating and celebrations, but they can also add charm and elegance to your year-round decor. Use them for special occasions or create a cozy atmosphere any time you desire.
🔋 Battery Operated: No need for messy cords or searching for electrical outlets. These candles are powered by batteries (not included), providing the freedom to place them wherever you like.
description: Add a Warm Glow to Your Space with the Red 'Flickabrights' Wax Candle by Premier Decorations - Battery Operated with Warm White LEDs and Convenient Timer Function for Effortless and Safe Candlelight! Elevate your decor and create a serene and charming atmosphere with the Red 'Flickabrights' Wax Candle by Premier Decorations. Order yours today and enjoy the convenience and beauty of safe, timer-controlled candlelight in your home.
